name: golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev
title: golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev
summary: reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs
description:
reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs
Gcfg reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs; supports
user-defined types and subsections.
.
This package provides go-gcfg/gcfg fork for usage in src-d/go-git.
